description: Inter-item dependency constraints - must-together and must-separate groups

must_together_groups.description: Items that must be placed in the same bag to preserve functionality

groups.name: Camera Core Equipment
groups.reason: Camera body is useless without battery and memory card
groups.notes: If user packs camera, all three must be together

groups.name: Camera Extended Kit
groups.reason: Charger needed for multi-day trips with camera

must_separate_groups.description: Items that should NOT be placed in the same bag due to risk or contamination

groups.name: Liquids vs Electronics
groups.notes: At most one item from each set should share a bag

groups.name: Liquids vs Formal Clothing
groups.reason: Liquid spillage can stain formal attire
